description: Literary narrative in Arabic script. 1001 nights? Mentions a baker and a salesman, then the narrator stumbles on a hidden treasure with a magical sapphire, then winds up at the king's palace. T-S NS 306.167 is probably another small piece of this book.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
